query_title: The Looney, Looney, Looney Bugs Bunny Movie

recommendations.title: Speedy Gonzales
recommendations.overview: Speedy comes to the aid of a group of mice trying to get the cheese from a factory guarded by Sylvester.

recommendations.title: Bugs Bunny's 3rd Movie: 1001 Rabbit Tales
recommendations.overview: If Bugs Bunny were to direct his signature inquiry--"What's up, doc?"--toward the modern-day Warner Bros. creative team, he wouldn't be far off. For 1001 Rabbit Tales, they've doctored up a batch of classic cartoons featuring the carrot muncher and h
recommendations.director: Robert McKimson, Friz Freleng, Chuck Jones

recommendations.title: Bugs Bunny's Looney Christmas Tales
recommendations.overview: A TV movie special that compiles of a few Looney Tunes episodes centered around an episode of a Christmas Carol, with the part of Scrooge played by Yosemite Sam.

recommendations.title: Daffy Duck's Movie: Fantastic Island
recommendations.overview: Daffy Duck and Speedy Gonzales find a treasure map that leads them to a wishing well, which for a penny will grant any wish (through old cartoon footage). Daffy sets up a resort around the well and various Looney Tunes characters have their dreams co
recommendations.director: Robert McKimson, Friz Freleng, Chuck Jones

recommendations.title: Daffy Duck's Quackbusters
recommendations.overview: In this feature-length film combining footage from classic Warner Brothers cartoon shorts with newly animated bridging sequences, Daffy Duck, after having induced laughter in an ailing millionaire and forestalled the millionaire's death for a time (a
recommendations.director: Terry Lennon, Friz Freleng, Robert McKimson, Chuck Jones, Greg Ford

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: Fantasia 2000
recommendations.overview: Blending lively music and brilliant animation, this sequel to the original 'Fantasia' restores 'The Sorcerer's Apprentice' and adds seven new shorts.
recommendations.director: Francis Glebas, Don Hahn, Paul Brizzi, James Algar, Eric Goldberg, Pixote Hunt, Gaëtan Brizzi, Hendel Butoy

recommendations.title: The Bugs Bunny/Road Runner Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Music, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A collection of Warner Brothers short cartoon features, "starring" the likes of Daffy Duck, Porky Pig and Wile.E.Coyote. These animations are interspersed by Bugs Bunny reminiscing on past events and providing links between the individual animations

recommendations.title: Rabbit Seasoning
recommendations.overview: Elmer Fudd is hunting both Daffy Duck and Bugs Bunny again.

recommendations.title: Long-Haired Hare
recommendations.overview: Bugs Bunny vs. a famous opera singer at the Hollywood Bowl.
